command:
set -e
echo "=== pyqual dependency check ==="
# Python tools (pip)
for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  вң“ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  вң— $pkg вҖ” installingвҖҰ"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  вҡ  $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  вң“ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  вң— claude вҖ” installingвҖҰ"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  вң“ claude installed" \
    || echo "  вҡ  claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="
stdout_tail:
=== pyqual dependency check ===
  вң— code2llm вҖ” installingвҖҰ
  вҡ  code2llm install failed (optional)
  вң— vallm вҖ” installingвҖҰ
  вҡ  vallm install failed (optional)
  вң— prefact вҖ” installingвҖҰ
  вҡ  prefact install failed (optional)
  вң— llx вҖ” installingвҖҰ
  вҡ  llx install failed (optional)
  вң— pytest-cov вҖ” installingвҖҰ
  вҡ  pytest-cov install failed (optional)
  вң— goal вҖ” installingвҖҰ
  вҡ  goal install failed (optional)
  вң“ claude 2.1.87 (Claude Code)
=== setup done ===

command:
export PATH="$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH"
ERRORS=""
[ -f .pyqual/errors.json ] && ERRORS=$(cat .pyqual/errors.json)
[ -f TODO.md ] && ERRORS="$ERRORS
$(cat TODO.md)"
if timeout 900 claude -p "Fix all quality gate failures in this Python project. Apply changes directly.

$ERRORS" \
  --model sonnet \
  --allowedTools "Edit,Read,Write,Bash(git diff),Bash(python),Bash(pytest -x)" \
  --output-format text; then
  echo "Claude Code fix completed."
else
  rc=$?
  echo "Claude Code exited with $rc (timeout=900s); falling back to llx fix."
  llx fix . --apply --errors .pyqual/errors.json --verbose
fi
stdout_tail:
You've hit your limit В· resets 5pm (Europe/Warsaw)
Claude Code exited with 1 (timeout=900s); falling back to llx fix.
вң— Errors file not found: .pyqual/errors.json

for pkg in code2llm vallm prefact llx pytest-cov goal; do
  if python -m pip show "$pkg" >/dev/null 2>&1; then
    echo "  вң“ $pkg"
  else
    echo "  вң— $pkg вҖ” installingвҖҰ"
    pip install -q "$pkg" || echo "  вҡ  $pkg install failed (optional)"
  fi
done
# Node tools (claude)
if command -v claude >/dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "  вң“ claude $(claude --version 2>/dev/null)"
else
  echo "  вң— claude вҖ” installingвҖҰ"
  npm install -g --prefix="$HOME/.local" @anthropic-ai/claude-code 2>/dev/null \
    && echo "  вң“ claude installed" \
    || echo "  вҡ  claude install failed (fix stage will use llx fallback)"
fi
# Claude Code auth can be either:
# - local OAuth session via `claude auth login`
# - ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in CI/GitHub Actions
# We only verify the CLI is available here.
echo "=== setup done ==="
